realPrompts.name: CRM System
realPrompts.prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.

realPrompts.name: Project Management
realPrompts.prompt: Create a project management tool like Trello with boards, cards, drag-and-drop, team assignments, due dates, and activity logs.

realPrompts.name: E-Commerce Store
realPrompts.prompt: Build an e-commerce store with products, categories, cart, checkout with Stripe, order tracking, and admin dashboard for inventory management.

realPrompts.name: Learning Management System
realPrompts.prompt: Create a learning management system with courses, lessons, quizzes, student progress tracking, certificates, and instructor dashboard.

realPrompts.name: Restaurant Reservation
realPrompts.prompt: Build a restaurant reservation system with table management, time slots, customer reviews, menu display, and admin analytics.

realPrompts.name: HR Management
realPrompts.prompt: Build an HR management app with employees, departments, leave requests, payroll tracking, performance reviews, and admin reports.

realPrompts.name: Real Estate Platform
realPrompts.prompt: Create a real estate listing platform with property search, filters, agent profiles, saved listings, contact forms, and admin property management.

realPrompts.name: Event Management
realPrompts.prompt: Build an event management platform with events, tickets, schedules, speaker profiles, attendee registration, and organizer dashboard.

realPrompts.name: Healthcare Booking
realPrompts.prompt: Create a healthcare appointment booking system with doctors, patients, medical records, prescriptions, appointment scheduling, and admin analytics.

realPrompts.name: Social Media Dashboard
realPrompts.prompt: Build a social media management dashboard with posts, analytics, scheduling, multiple platform support, team collaboration, and content calendar.

edgeCases.name: Conflicting Requirements
edgeCases.prompt: Public app with private data that everyone can edit but no one can see

edgeCases.name: Massive Scope
edgeCases.prompt: Build me Facebook + Twitter + LinkedIn combined with all features, real-time messaging, stories, marketplace, job board, and video streaming

edgeCases.name: Non-App Request
edgeCases.prompt: Write me a poem about databases and their beauty in the moonlight

edgeCases.name: Contradictory Roles
edgeCases.prompt: All users are admin but admins have restricted access and cannot see any data while regular users see everything

edgeCases.name: No UI Needed
edgeCases.prompt: Background job that processes CSV files and sends email reports every morning

edgeCases.name: Complex Auth
edgeCases.prompt: 5-level approval workflow with delegation, escalation, timeout rules, deputy assignments, and audit trail for each approval step

edgeCases.name: Ambiguous Naming
edgeCases.prompt: Thing manager with stuff and items that do actions on objects which contain elements of various categories
